title: BackColor Property
description: Gets or sets the background color of a form or control.
notes:
To use the BackColor property, you must set the BackColorMode property to 1 - User.

See Also: BackColor Property

ForeColor Property

GUI Items: BackColor Property

Form, Button, Label, TextBox, RadioButton, CheckBox, ListBox, ComboBox, PictureBox, GroupBox, LED, ProgressBar, TrackBar, StatusBar
